creator: bsd@dino.sk
text:
When OpenSSL option for security/vpnc port is selected, package is not created in stage step and so there is nothing to install in install step.

Excerpt from portmaster security/vpnc output:

===>  Staging for vpnc-0.5.3_8
===>   vpnc-0.5.3_8 depends on executable: vpnc-script - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 555 -m 751 /data/workdir/9-i386/usr/ports/security/vpnc/work/vpnc-0.5.3/vpnc /data/workdir/9-i386/usr/ports/security/vpnc/work/stage/usr/local/sbin/vpnc
install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 555 /data/workdir/9-i386/usr/ports/security/vpnc/work/vpnc-0.5.3/cisco-decrypt /data/workdir/9-i386/usr/ports/security/vpnc/work/stage/usr/local/bin
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /data/workdir/9-i386/usr/ports/security/vpnc/work/vpnc-0.5.3/cisco-decrypt.1 /data/workdir/9-i386/usr/ports/security/vpnc/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1
install  -o root -g wheel -m 555 -m 751 /data/workdir/9-i386/usr/ports/security/vpnc/work/vpnc-0.5.3/vpnc-disconnect  /data/workdir/9-i386/usr/ports/security/vpnc/work/stage/usr/local/sbin/vpnc-disconnect
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 -m 600 /data/workdir/9-i386/usr/ports/security/vpnc/work/vpnc-0.5.3/vpnc.conf  /data/workdir/9-i386/usr/ports/security/vpnc/work/stage/usr/local/etc/vpnc.conf.sample
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 -m 600 /data/workdir/9-i386/usr/ports/security/vpnc/work/vpnc-0.5.3/vpnc.conf /data/workdir/9-i386/usr/ports/security/vpnc/work/stage/usr/local/etc
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /data/workdir/9-i386/usr/ports/security/vpnc/work/vpnc-0.5.3/vpnc.8 /data/workdir/9-i386/usr/ports/security/vpnc/work/stage/usr/local/man/man8
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===> Staging rc.d startup script(s)
===>  vpnc-0.5.3_8 may not be packaged: binary linked against OpenSSL must not be redistributed.
===>  Installing for vpnc-0.5.3_8
===>  Checking if security/vpnc already installed
pkg_add: can't stat package file '/usr/ports/packages/All/vpnc-0.5.3_8.tbz'
man pages (compress-man)

How-To-Repeat: portmaster security/vpnc

or

cd /usr/ports/security/vpnc
make

and select OpenSSL option.
